seoTitle: Camerons Creek vs Cammeray — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Camerons Creek vs Cammeray: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Camerons Creek and Cammeray.
heading: Camerons Creek vs Cammeray — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Camerons Creek, New South Wales and Cammeray, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cammeray has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Camerons Creek (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Camerons Creek or Cammeray safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Camerons Creek has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Cammeray scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Camerons Creek scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Cammeray scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Camerons Creek or Cammeray?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cammeray has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
